hooks.command: if [ -n "$TINSTAR_SESSION_NAME" ]; then curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5273/api/hooks/idle -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d "{\"session\":\"$TINSTAR_SESSION_NAME\",\"conversationId\":\"$CLAUDE_SESSION_ID\"}"; fi

if [ -n "$TINSTAR_SESSION_NAME" ]; then curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5273/api/hooks/active -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d "{\"session\":\"$TINSTAR_SESSION_NAME\",\"conversationId\":\"$CLAUDE_SESSION_ID\"}"; fi

if [ -n "$TINSTAR_SESSION_NAME" ]; then curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5273/api/hooks/active -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d "{\"session\":\"$TINSTAR_SESSION_NAME\",\"conversationId\":\"$CLAUDE_SESSION_ID\"}"; fi

if [ -n "$TINSTAR_SESSION_NAME" ]; then HOOK_INPUT=$(cat); FILE_PATH=$(echo "$HOOK_INPUT" | sed -n 's/.*"file_path"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"\([^"]*\)".*/\1/p'); if [ -n "$FILE_PATH" ]; then curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5273/api/hooks/file-touched -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d "{\"session\":\"$TINSTAR_SESSION_NAME\",\"path\":\"$FILE_PATH\"}"; fi; fi

if [ -n "$TINSTAR_SESSION_NAME" ]; then HOOK_INPUT=$(cat); FILE_PATH=$(echo "$HOOK_INPUT" | sed -n 's/.*"file_path"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"\([^"]*\)".*/\1/p'); if [ -n "$FILE_PATH" ]; then curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5273/api/hooks/file-read -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d "{\"session\":\"$TINSTAR_SESSION_NAME\",\"path\":\"$FILE_PATH\"}"; fi; fi
